# GKAgent3D

**Class**

An agent that operates in a three-dimensional space.

## Declaration

```swift
class GKAgent3D
```

## Overview

Agents are game entities that move according to realistic constraints and whose behavior is determined by goals that motivate movement. The general functionality of an agent is defined by the abstract superclass [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent]; however, you use instances of the [doc://com.apple.gameplaykit/documentation/GameplayKit/GKAgent3D] class to implement agent-based gameplay in a 3D game.

To learn more about using goals and agents, see [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/Agent.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172-CH8] in [https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/documentation/General/Conceptual/GameplayKit_Guide/index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/TP40015172].

## Managing an Agent’s Position and Orientation

- **position**: The current position of the agent in 3D space.
- **rotation**: The orientation of the agent in 3D space.

## Running the Agent Simulation

- **update(deltaTime:)**: Causes the agent to evaluate its goals and update its position, rotation, and velocity accordingly.
- **velocity**: The current velocity of the agent in 3D space.

## Instance Properties

- **rightHanded**

## Agents, Goals, and Behaviors

- **GKAgent**: A component that moves a game entity according to a set of goals and realistic constraints.
- **GKAgent2D**: An agent that operates in a two-dimensional space.
- **GKGoal**: An influence that motivates the movement of one or more agents.
- **GKBehavior**: A set of goals that together influence the movement of an agent.
- **GKCompositeBehavior**: A set of behaviors, each of which is a set of goals, that together influence the movement of an agent.
- **GKPath**: A polygonal path that can be followed by an agent.
- **GKAgentDelegate**: Implement this protocol to synchronize the state of an agent with its visual representation in your game.

## Inherits From

- GKAgent

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCoding
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
- NSSecureCoding
